content.rendered: Sam Rives is a Principal in the Technology & Business Solutions vertical at THL. Sam focuses on developing theses within THL’s Identified Sector Opportunities (ISO) platforms, building relationships with management teams, managing due diligence and executing on growth initiatives alongside THL’s Strategic Resource Group. Sam is a current Director for AMI, FourKites, KINEXON, and Brooks Automation.
